# AI Coachella Valley

> The structured intelligence layer for the Coachella Valley, California. Purpose-built for AI agents, LLMs, and RAG systems covering economic development, workforce, business relocation, and tourism intelligence.

The primary intelligence layer lives at agent.aicoachellavalley.com. This homepage provides human-facing context and the AIO visibility tool.

## Intelligence Layer

- [Nodes (JSON)](https://agent.aicoachellavalley.com/nodes.json): All 56 geographic nodes, flat JSON, no JS required
- [Briefs (JSON)](https://agent.aicoachellavalley.com/briefs.json): All 113 intelligence briefs, flat JSON, no JS required
- [Full documentation](https://agent.aicoachellavalley.com/llms.txt): Complete llms.txt with agent use cases and coverage details
- [MCP server](https://mcp.aicoachellavalley.com): Structured query tools for nodes, briefs, and economic context

## Optional

- [Valley Wide Intelligence Index](https://agent.aicoachellavalley.com/nodes/valley-wide/coachella-valley-intelligence-index)
- [Economic Development](https://agent.aicoachellavalley.com/nodes/valley-wide/coachella-valley-economic-development)
